title: Administrator signs in successfully
description: An administrator can submit valid credentials on the sign-in page and reach the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin-login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Verify the operations dashboard is displayed

title: Homepage renders key visitor content
description: A visitor can open the homepage and see the hero section, services, and active focus domains.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll through the homepage content
Verify the hero section is displayed
Verify services are displayed
Verify active focus domains are displayed

title: Homepage loads as the public entry point
description: A visitor can open the public homepage and view the main landing content without needing to sign in.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify the hero section is displayed
Verify the public landing content is displayed

title: Homepage content remains accessible through full scroll
description: A visitor can scroll through the full homepage and still find the key marketing content in the page layout.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the bottom of the homepage
Verify services are still present on the page
Verify active focus domains are still present on the page

title: Administrator can review the sign-in form before submitting
description: An administrator can open the sign-in page and confirm the email and password controls are available for use.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin-login
Verify the email field is displayed
Verify the password field is displayed
Verify the sign-in button is displayed

title: Administrator can retry sign-in after a failed attempt
description: An administrator can correct a failed sign-in attempt and successfully reach the dashboard on a subsequent submission.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin-login
Fill in the email field with invalid@example.com
Fill in the password field with invalid-password
Submit the sign-in form
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Verify the operations dashboard is displayed

title: Administrator login is usable from a fresh visit
description: An administrator can return to the sign-in page and still use the form to access the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin-login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Verify the operations dashboard is displayed

title: Administrator sees feedback for invalid credentials
description: An administrator who submits invalid credentials sees a clear sign-in error and does not reach the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin-login
Fill in the email field with invalid@example.com
Fill in the password field with invalid-password
Submit the sign-in form
Verify a sign-in error message is visible
Verify the operations dashboard is not displayed
